record_types.name: Tuple

subprograms.name: Add_Carry
subprograms.code: function Add_Carry (X, Y, Carry : U64) return Tuple

documentation.description:
Computes `X + Y + Carry`, returning the result along with the new carry
(0, 1, or 2).

subprograms.name: Add_Wide
subprograms.code: function Add_Wide (X_Hi, X_Lo, Y_Hi, Y_Lo : U64) return Tuple

documentation.description:
Adds wide numbers represented by pairs of (most significant word, least
significant word) and returns the result in the same format `(hi, lo)`.

subprograms.name: Div2By1
subprograms.code: function Div2By1 (U1, U0 : U64; Re : Recip) return Tuple

documentation.description:
Calculate the quotient and the remainder of the division of a wide word
(supplied as high and low words U1 and U0) by `D`, with a precalculated
reciprocal `Re`.

subprograms.name: Div3By2
subprograms.code:
function Div3By2
  (U2, U1, U0 : U64; V1_Recip : Recip; V0 : U64) return U64

documentation.description:
Given two long integers `U = (..., U0, U1, U2)` and `V = (..., V0, V1)`
(where `U2` and `V1` are the most significant limbs), where
`floor(U / V) <= U64'Last`, calculates `Q` such that
`Q - 1 <= floor(U / V) <= Q`.
In place of `V1` takes its reciprocal, and assumes that `V` was already
pre-shifted so that V1 has its most significant bit set (that is, the
reciprocal's `Shift` is 0).

subprograms.name: Mac
subprograms.code: function Mac (A, B, C, Carry : U64) return Tuple

documentation.description:
Computes `a + (b * c) + carry`, returning the result along with the new
carry.

subprograms.name: Mul_Wide
subprograms.code: function Mul_Wide (X, Y : U64) return Tuple

documentation.description:
Multiplies `X` and `Y`, returning the most significant
and the least significant words as `(hi, lo)`.

subprograms.name: Overflowing_Add
subprograms.code: function Overflowing_Add (X, Y : U64) return Tuple

documentation.description: Computes `X + Y`, returning the result along with the carry (0 or 1).

documentation.returns:
Calculates the reciprocal of the given 64-bit divisor with the
highmost bit set.

subprograms.name: Saturating_Sub
subprograms.code: function Saturating_Sub (A, B : U64) return U64

subprograms.name: Sub_Borrow
subprograms.code: function Sub_Borrow (X, Y, Borrow : U64) return Tuple

documentation.description:
Computes `X - (Y + Borrow)`, returning the result along with the new
borrow.
